title: Project Proposal Carolina Payeras
text:
I am very interested in development in Colombia, specifically the impacts of the guerilla presence in the rainforests and the rural areas. My proposal for a research question is: Is there an association between increases in poverty in rural areas of Colombia and increases in paramilitary/guerilla activity? I am curious to study this relationship to, via this project, investigate the relationship between rural poverty and violence. Another possible question that could come of this could be: Do increases in investment in rural areas of Colombia decrease guerilla activity?
For data sets, I was thinking of using the following:
Colombian conflict data from HDX https://data.humdata.org/dataset/colombia-acled-conflict-data
Specific variables: Admin1, Admin2, Events, Fatalities
Colombian poverty data from the World Bank: https://data.humdata.org/dataset/colombia-pobreza-multidimensional-departamental
Specific variables: Incidencia de Pobreza Multidimensional en IPM Departamentos para ver la pobreza por región de Colombia

title: Carolina Payeras - PSCI 3200 Final Project
section: This site hosts my final project for PSCI 3200.
